title: hieracium subcrassifolium
intro: Hieracium subcrassifolium, also known as Rough Hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to help reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Hieracium subcrassifolium include its potential to aid in the treatment of urinary tract issues, as well as its possible anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support kidney function and relieve symptoms associated with urinary tract infections.
